evidence_excerpt: Cardiomyopathy had resolved after one month of treatment. He has continued to develop normally and has had no further episodes.

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: He has continued to develop normally.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: No further episodes reported after resolution of cardiomyopathy.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: Cardiomyopathy had resolved after one month of this treatment.
He has continued to develop normally and has had no further episodes.

notes_on_uncertainty: The source describes multiple VLCAD patients; this summary is specifically based on Patient 11 (VLCAD-C). The index time is taken as the date of diagnosis by blood acylcarnitine analysis and initiation of Portagen and L-carnitine. Long-term categorization is inferred from the statement of normal development and no further episodes at 3.5 years; exact dates are not provided.
